title: Immersive Weathering Connected Glass
description: Adds connected glass to Immersive Weathering, uses Fusion.
body:
Adds connected glass to Immersive Weathering, needs [Fusion library](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering) to work.

It's recommended to pair it with other mod that adds connected glass to Minecraft's default glass.

Credits to Midnighttiger for the tinted glass texture.
